nodes.label: Lightweight person Re-ID feature extractor (OSNet x0.25, MSMT17 weights).  Downl
Normalize .pt / .pth contents to a flat state_dict mapping.
Loads OSNet x0.25 (MSMT17) and extracts L2-normalized 512-D embeddings from play
Crop ``bbox`` (x1, y1, x2, y2), resize to ReID input, return 512-D vector.
